texto: By not knowing what we needed to know and knowing what we did not need to know
autor: that verily has made us cry (suffer) in this world. This indeed increases our burden.
explicacao: Citação de that verily has made us cry (suffer) in this world. This indeed increases our burden. sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “By not knowing what we needed to know and knowing what we did not need to know” articula reflexao, dada-bhagwan, knowing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
